description: Grid-tied PV + Battery (design variable), TOU tariff, San Francisco CA
notes: Pure-SAMBA LP baseline. The LP installs the minimum PV needed to satisfy the 50% renewable-fraction constraint and no battery (too expensive vs grid), so NPC sits above the grid-only case because the RE constraint is binding.

npc.note: ±10% — LP regression gate; solver/float variation across machines

battery_kwh.note: ±5 kWh absolute — ref=0 so relative is undefined

renewable_fraction.note: ±0.05 absolute. KPI uses pv_dc*eta/total_generation; constraint uses pv_dc*eta/load. KPI~0.52 when constraint binds at 0.50.

annual_diesel_l.note: ±50 L absolute — no DG in this scenario
